parts.title: Writing Task 1
parts.instruction: You should spend about 20 minutes on this task. Write at least 150 words.
parts.prompt: The graph below shows the consumption of fish and different kinds of meat in a European country between 1979 and 2004.

parts.title: Writing Task 2
parts.instruction: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Write at least 250 words.
parts.prompt: In many countries, very few young people read newspapers or watch TV news. Why is this? What can be done to encourage them to take more interest in news?
